::: content-hidden

\newcommand{\deriv}[2]{\frac{\rd #1}{\rd #2}}
\newcommand{\nthderiv}[3]{\frac{\rd^#3 #1}{\rd #2}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb R}
\newcommand\norm[1]{\left\lVert#1\right\rVert}
\newcommand{\bfx}{\mathbf x}
\newcommand{\bfu}{\mathbf u}
\newcommand\mbf[1]{\textbf{#1}}
\newcommand\ttt[1]{\texttt{#1}}
\newcommand\flo{\text{fl}}
\newcommand{\green}[1]{\color{green}{#1}}
\newcommand{\red}[1]{\style{color:#d1002d}{#1}}
\newcommand{\blue}[1]{\style{color:blue}{#1}}
\newcommand{\black}[1]{\color{black}{#1}}
\newcommand{\cG}{\mathcal{G}}
\newcommand{\cF}{\mathcal{F}}
\newcommand{\argmin}{\operatorname*{arg\,min}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\co}{\textrm {Cov}}

:::
